org.docgene.help.gui.swing

Interface ContentViewer

  • All Superinterfaces:
    HelpContentViewer<javax.swing.JComponent,java.awt.Window>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SwingHelpContentViewer

    public interface ContentViewer
extends HelpContentViewer<javax.swing.JComponent,java.awt.Window>
    The ContentViewer interface for the Swing helper viewer.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer

        HELP_CLIENT_PROPERTY, ICON_BACKWARD, ICON_FORWARD, ICON_GLOSSARY, ICON_HOME
